serviceNotes.engine oil: M112 2.6L V6: 15,000 km or 12 months typical EU plan.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Port-injection V6; carbon rarely an issue.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7644-2002/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W211 E 200 Kompressor proxy; M112 2.6L W211 EU Oil Service matches)
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — M112 V6 air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (Inspection table); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7648-2002/service has no interval table
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — M112 V6 spark plugs 60,000 km / 48 months
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant first exchange ~150,000 km (ASSYST-era table)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory / serpentine belt ~100,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance orientation; confirm condition
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Port-injection M112 — intake valve carbon minimal vs direct injection; specialist discretionary ~120,000 km
